almost same amount of leads

103 books / 128 books 
not completed that much jobs 
their sales is at 67,000 this year / 155,000 last year 
 

Thanks much!

title: TCR Compliance Updates to all forms
description:
Seeking help w/ the following request for gene johnson please.  
https://www.genejohnsonplumbing.com/


1. Add / update the check box text for all the forms on the site please. The check box should have these:
By checking this box, I consent to receive marketing and promotional calls, and emails from or on behalf of Gene Johnson Plumbing, Heating, Cooling & Electrical and its affiliates using an automated system or auto dialer for any purpose, including heating, cooling, electrical and plumbing. Consent is not a condition of purchase, and I can opt-out at any time.

2. Add a 2nd check box text below the 1st one: (unchecked by default) checkbox:
By checking this box, I agree to receive marketing and promotional text messages from Gene Johnson Plumbing, Heating, Cooling & Electrical at the number provided, including offers and service updates. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. Reply STOP to opt out, HELP for help. Consent is not a condition of purchase. View our Privacy Policy and Terms.

**Remember, this is for ALL forms on each of the Seattle sites. Also link to the Privacy Policy and new SMS-Terms pages (see no4 below). The blue text above should be hyperlinked.

3. Add text to he Privacy Policy page, add a paragraph like this:

SMS Privacy

Mobile information will not be shared with third parties/affiliates for marketing or promotional purposes. Text messaging opt-in data and consent will not be shared with any third parties. 


4. Create a new page for each of the sites. This is the page that is linked to from the "Terms" link in the new SMS form disclaimer:

https://brand-name/sms-terms/

SMS/Messaging & Opt-Out
By opting in to messaging from Gene Johnson Plumbing, Heating, Cooling & Electrical, you agree to receive appointment reminders, informational, marketing and other types of messages from us. Message frequency may vary and data rates from your provider may apply. You may opt out of all future messaging by replying STOP to any SMS message. You can also reply HELP for assistance, or info@genejohnsonservices.com. You may also opt out or request assistance by calling Gene Johnson Plumbing, Heating, Cooling & Electrical at (206) 792-7495. When you opt out, you will receive no further messages from us.

Thanks!

title: Facebook Pixels Code
assignees: Bogdan Zakharchyshyn, Den, Evgenii Gusarovskii, Jordan, Keith Bruss, Myroslav Abdeljawwad, Predrag
description:
Request: Install Meta Pixel on your website: https://www.genejohnsonplumbing.com/

Steps provided below by the client:
** The Meta Pixel is a piece of code that you add to your website by copying the base code below and pasting it into the header section of your website.

1. Copy base code
Copy the Meta Pixel base code below.

<!-- Meta Pixel Code -->
<script>
!function(f,b,e,v,n,t,s)
{if(f.fbq)return;n=f.fbq=function(){n.callMethod?
n.callMethod.apply(n,arguments):n.queue.push(arguments)};
if(!f._fbq)f._fbq=n;n.push=n;n.loaded=!0;n.version='2.0';
n.queue=[];t=b.createElement(e);t.async=!0;
t.src=v;s=b.getElementsByTagName(e)[0];
s.parentNode.insertBefore(t,s)}(window, document,'script',
'https://connect.facebook.net/en_US/fbevents.js');
fbq('init', '1217399839598887');
fbq('track', 'PageView');
</script>
<noscript><img height="1" width="1" style="display:none"
src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=1217399839598887&ev=PageView&noscript=1"
/></noscript>
<!-- End Meta Pixel Code -->

2. Paste base code to website
Paste the Meta Pixel code between the <head> and </head> tags of your web page. You may already have other existing code between the head tags, so just place the pixel code underneath that, but above </head>. Install the base code on every page of your website. See more detailed instructions.

3. Save website code changes
Before returning to this screen, refresh your website to save and confirm the changes you made to your website's code.

Thanks much!

title: Website/SEO Findings
description:
Hi, seeking help w/ a client email. 

I have added the email verbatim below to be sure:
---
Hi Clixsy team,

I’d like you to review the following website recommendations. This will be the first round of several updates for items flagged as issues during a website audit. Can you have your SEO/Website team look into these items?


1. Indexed Pages
Over 150 pages are indexable but arent getting any traffic at all. These pages will need to be reviewed and either modified if it's a page that we want, or noindexed. These pages can be found in the "Pages to review indexability" tab.

2. Internal Linking
There are 24 either 3xx or 4xx links to review and correct. Those can be found on the 3xx and 4xx links page.

3. Duplicate Page Titles
There are currently 14 pages with duplicate title tags. All are indexable but shouldn't be available to Google.

4. Heading Tags
Several h1s are missing a primary service area. It seems like h1s and h2s are backward because h2 include the full service + service area style of h1 that we want. These will all needed to be redone. I would like h1s to lead with service + geo to be more clear.

5. Page Title Optimizations
Several page titles are not optimized. Some aren't property structured with a (service) in (city) | (brand) format. Others include irrelevant keywords that don’t match page content, which is causing confusion in SERPs.

6. Orphaned Pages
All https://www.genejohnsonplumbing.com/press-releases/ related pages are orphan pages and should be better linked within the website.

7. Meta Description Optimizations
My goal for meta descriptions is to sell the click and act as a mini elevator pitch within the 150–155 character limit. The current meta descriptions on the website seem vague and lack differentiation.

8 Schema.org
The website currently has LocalBusiness, FAQ, Review, and Organization schema. There is a big opportunity for Service schema which isnt found on any pages.

9. Duplicate Pages
There are 38 pages that have duplicate page issues. Some of these pages should probably be taken down. Other ones should be rewritten to go more into detail. A lot of these are scoring high duplicate percentages because the are very light on content. Duplicate pages are listed in the Duplicate pages tab.

10. Content Optimziations
I believe we will need to overhaul most of the content on the website. There are several pages that do not have good content on them and would benefit for a rewrite. There are several conflicting pages. Key pages will need to be indivually reviewed and resvised.



Thanks much!

title: Priority Zip Codes for Gene Johnson
description:
Hi,

Email title: Priority Zip Codes for Gene Johnson

Email info:
As you continue rolling out new content, I want to share Gene Johnson’s current top priority ZIP codes. Please prioritize these service areas before all other communities in the next round of content updates and creation.

Our goal is to make sure our content fully covers all plumbing services across these target areas:

98105 - Seattle, WA (University District / Ravenna area)
98133 - Seattle, WA (Bitter Lake / Haller Lake / Northgate area)
98004 - Bellevue, WA (Downtown Bellevue, Medina area)
98155 - Shoreline, WA and Lake Forest Park, WA
98144 - Seattle, WA (Central District / Mount Baker / Leschi)
98135 - Seattle, WA (Sand Point)
98375 - Puyallup, WA (South Hill area)
98409 - Tacoma, WA (South Tacoma)
98040 - Mercer Island, WA

Thanks much

CC

description:
Does anyone know the history behind this?

There's a link in the sitemap:

https://www.genejohnsonplumbing.com/drain-cleaning/

The canonical is https://www.genejohnsonplumbing.com/drains/ and it redirects there. This link is also in the menu.

This seems like a strange redirect for a page about Drain Cleaning. Shouldn't we have a main Drains page with a link to cleaning/installation/repair pages from it?

If it IS deliberate then can you please rebuild the xml sitemap?
